prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical cinematic concept art scene set in a snowy cyberpunk Japanese mountain city at night. The viewpoint is from street level, looking up a wet stone stairway through a massive red wooden torii-style gate with a snow-covered roof beam and a central wooden sign reading 山形道. Two large glowing paper lanterns hang on the left and right sides of the gate, each also marked 山形道, and exactly two smaller square lanterns hang beneath the gate beam. In the foreground, place exactly two young travelers seen mostly from behind, both wearing long weathered sci-fi kimono coats, layered armor, backpacks, belts, pouches, boots, and subtle cybernetic equipment; the left traveler is slightly taller with short dark hair and turns toward the right traveler, while the right traveler has a shorter bob haircut and looks back at the left traveler. Around them, include exactly four armed armored guards clearly visible near the gate area, plus one robed civilian with a straw hat at the far left and a small street vendor stall at the right. The city rises vertically in dense stacked wooden-and-metal buildings, pipes, catwalks, bridges, balconies, windows, neon signs, and hanging paper signs, blending Edo-period architecture with dystopian industrial science fiction. Use many warm amber window lights and lantern glows against cold blue-gray snow, mist, and towering dark structures. Snow falls through the air, rooftops and railings are dusted with snow, and the pavement is glossy with puddles reflecting orange lantern light. Mood: mysterious, immersive, lived-in, grand scale, quiet before an adventure. Style: ultra-detailed anime-realistic digital painting, intricate environmental design, cinematic lighting, atmospheric depth, sharp foreground detail, deep perspective, 9:16 vertical composition, no modern cars, no English signage, no watermark.
